image_prompt: An Ancient Egyptian tomb wall painting filling the entire frame, edge to edge, painted directly on plastered limestone in the New Kingdom Theban style. Earthy mineral pigments — ochre red and yellow, malachite green, Egyptian blue, carbon black outlines on a warm cream ground. title: Tempest at Sea - Romanticism (AI Animated)
image_prompt: A dramatic 19th-century Romanticism marine oil painting on canvas, in the sublime tradition of J.M.W. Turner and Ivan Aivazovsky, filling the entire frame. Rich impasto brushwork, glazed translucent water, dramatic chiaroscuro, the awesome power of nature. no museum, no display case, no glass, no vitrine, no pedestal or plinth, no gallery wall, no spotlight, no museum label, no plain studio background, no frame, the painting fills the frame edge to edge

The sailing ship pitches and rolls heavily with the swell, sails luffing in the wind, but keeps its solid form. Dramatic, powerful, cinematic storm — wind and water in motion, the vessel intact.
